data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Post-completion certificate', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this feature is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for a post-completion certificate, but there is no evidence of its existence or how it is generated, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. Therefore, the evidence fails to satisfy the requirement for a post-completion certificate.
gaps: No evidence of the implementation of a post-completion certificate.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify post-completion certificate generation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if a post-completion certificate is generated after task completion.
